tree.name: Coby White
tree.tradeDescription: Hornets traded Collin Sexton, Ousmane Dieng, and three future 2nd-round picks to Bulls for Coby White and Mike Conley Jr. (Conley subsequently waived).
tree.note: Explosive scoring guard, former UNC standout. Two-time All-Star caliber player with Bulls.

assetsGivenUp.name: Collin Sexton
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hornets traded Jusuf Nurkic to Jazz for Collin Sexton. Utah also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jusuf Nurkic
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hornets traded Cody Martin and Vasilije Micic to Suns for Jusuf Nurkic. Phoenix also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cody Martin
assetsGivenUp.note: Nevada twin, signed as undrafted free agent by Hornets in 2019

assetsGivenUp.name: Vasilije Micic
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Thunder as part of Gordon Hayward trade. CHA sent Hayward to OKC for Tre Mann, Micic, Davis Bertans, cash, 2024 2nd (HOU own), and 2025 2nd (PHI own).

assetsGivenUp.name: Gordon Hayward
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hornets traded a 2022 2nd round pick (did not convey) to Celtics for Hayward, 2023 2nd (BOS own), and 2024 2nd (BOS own). Boston also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Former All-Star forward, 4yr/$120M sign-and-trade from Celtics

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Hornets' own 2022 2nd-round pick, sent to Boston in Hayward S&T. Conditional — did not convey.

assetsGivenUp.name: Trade Exception
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Boston received a $28.5M trade exception as part of the Gordon Hayward sign-and-trade
assetsGivenUp.note: Trade exception generated from Hayward's outgoing salary. BOS used part of it to acquire Daniel Theis from HOU in Feb 2022.

assetsGivenUp.name: Ousmane Dieng
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hornets acquired Ousmane Dieng and a 2nd-round pick from Thunder for Mason Plumlee. Dieng was then re-routed to Bulls in the Coby White trade.
assetsGivenUp.note: French forward with length and playmaking

assetsGivenUp.name: Mason Plumlee
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Pistons traded Mason Plumlee and the #37 pick (JT Thor) to Hornets for the #57 pick (Balsa Koprivica).

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick (#57)
assetsGivenUp.note: Hornets' own 2021 2nd-round pick (#57), sent to Pistons in Plumlee trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Future second round pick, sent to Bulls in Coby White trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Future second round pick, sent to Bulls in Coby White trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Future second round pick, sent to Bulls in Coby White trade
